JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $200.00 A MONTH STARTING MAY-08-17 AND ENDING WHEN THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MIRCLE VAOVASA WILL SPLIT THE $200.00 A MONTH WITH THE SECOND JUDGMENT DEBTOR SUBRINA LEAPAGA. PARTIES DO NOT NEED TO APPEAR IF THE PAYMENTS ARE MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY FOUR MONTHS UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR A-L FINANCIAL CORP. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MILLE YANG, BRANCH MANAGER.
